name: 道の駅 豊前おこしかけ
desc: 福岡県と大分県の県境に位置する道の駅。物産館では取れたて野菜や果物を、屋台村では地元の海の幸・山の幸を活かした料理を提供。週末には養殖の「みらいサーモン」も並ぶ。
descEn: Sitting right on the border between Fukuoka and Oita prefectures, the market hall offers freshly picked vegetables and fruit, while the food stalls serve dishes made with local seafood and mountain produce. Farm-raised 'Mirai Salmon' also appears on weekends.
